author: Craig T.
pros: Huntress is a great vendor with fantastic service and ongoing training for our clients and our own systems.
cons: No complaints from them or their products - we love their service and ongoing partnership at our IT company.

review_title: If you want a simple, high value MDR, look no further than Huntress
description: Huntress, overall is great. They have been very helpful from a support and marketing standpoint, enabling partners. And it's so simple.
author: Jared M.
pros: Huntress is a quiet MDR. They are a trusted and reputable security company without the noise. Great value for the money! I like how it integrates with either Defender or MDE/MDB. They love to empower partners as well. Super easy setup/deployment and integrates direct with RMM.
cons: So, being a tech guy, sometimes I like the noise. I suppose I wish I had, if desired, deep insights into the backend logs to see the events/logs & escalations. Compared to Blackpoint, there is basically 1-5% of the entire default noise that Blackpoint sends. I think BP's noise is too much; but I like a healthy amount for trust, viability, etc. I have yet to have an incident (over the past year with 4 customers) ever escalate to the point where Huntress would have to stop or isolate a user or device, but I'm confident they are experts and will respond.

description: Overall it has been an improvement to our cyber security platform. The cost is fair to cover the support & service in general.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It provides reassurance that othe security of our devices, infrastructure & software is covered by a 24x7 service which proactively monitors, alerts & resolves cyber issues.
cons: The setup was quite complex & there are a few false positives raised but once the config wass confirmed this has decreased.

review_title: Huntress EDR - Easy setup to get started
author: Billy R.
pros: The community/culture of the Huntress team is great. Joining their weekly groups is great education on what is going on in today's world.
cons: I feel as if it is playing catchup or adding needed services JUST behind other competitors. I wish there was also a built in script for deployment rather than customized one.

review_title: Excellent Product, Excellent Support, Excellent Price
author: Lucas B.
pros: Support is number 1 in my opinion, the team behind Huntress are second to none, always available and willing to help and know their stuff. The product is light on machines, has a great dashboard and alerting is wonderful.
cons: Would love for it to integrate with Defender for Business instead of just the free Windows Defender.

description: It is very well tuned to the MSP model. The Huntress team has built their product to play very nicely with a multi tenant IT management model. Everything can be partitioned granularly, and the integrations/rollout of the product are extremely easy.
author: David B.
pros: -The Huntress team reviews and classifies severity of alerts before they get to our team, which reduces our workload. They also include remediation plans and work with us if needed. -The rollout/integrations were very smooth and out clients didn't experience negative issues as a result of the rollout. -The pricing model works very well for the SMB market.
cons: It is not as advanced as other software like a SentinelOne or a Crowdstrike, but it can work well in tandem with them.

review_title: One of the best Security tools we use
description: Has shown its value with protecting customers in real-world events. We use it to help with remediation on customers that were not previously using it, makes cleanup and visibility easy.
author: Chris B.
pros: Huntress is very easy to use. The remediation details are great, and with the new auto remediation its even easier.
cons: There is nothing I don't like about Huntress.

review_title: Brilliant Managed response and detection tool
description: It has been brilliant, we have deployed this tool across all our clients and it has been smooth with no issues. We have integrated this with 365 to monitor user accounts and have set up automated report for each client.
author: Wasek T.
pros: What I like the most is how lightweight it is on system resources. The canary function is brilliant as it will setup dummy files to detect if there is a breach.
cons: Then user interface can be a bit complicated as there are too many menus. The tools it offers is brilliant but it could be a bit more user friendly to get the best out of the system.

review_title: Great product at their price point
author: Jordan D.
pros: Huntress is extremely simple and straightfoward. Very easy to deploy. The expertise behind the scenes if fantastic as well.
cons: Customization on the alert tuning. Integrations with other tools would fill in some missing value as well.

review_title: Easy to setup, easy to maintain, easy to rollout.
author: Gert-Jan S.
pros: Easy to setup, easy to maintain, easy to rollout. it is how a top notch security product should be.
cons: Notifcations could be slightly better if i have to name one thing.

description: Fantastic experience. They are developing quickly and are one of the best in the industry now.
author: Andrew J.
pros: Their incident reports are Amazing! They action on incidents incredibly quick.
cons: No EDR integrations. We need to deploy a n EDR like S1 still to action on events In real time.

review_title: I couldn't do my job without it
description: Outstanding! A+++ I simply couldn't do my job without Huntress. I rely on daily and is almost always opened and in use.
author: Andrew M.
pros: Easy, simply to understand and navigate GUI. Highly intuitive and responsive agent with real-time reporting and next level support when you need it most.
cons: Lack of merch. The only real problem I have with Huntress is the fact I can't display my support and use of the application in the real world. That's how good it is.

description: Positive experience overall. Support team has been friendly and service has assisted in remediation and prevention of cyber attacks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Having an extra set of eyes watching over our customer fleet from a security perspective is reassuring. Additional value add for our customers helping us bring security to the forefront of the conversation.
cons: Features under continuous development, so waiting for a specific feature to come into fruition requires patience (EDR).

description: Adding this to our portfolio has been one of our best business decisions yet.
author: Brad S.
pros: I love everything about this product, from the ease of deployment to the alerting.
cons: I honestly have yet to find any faults in this product.

review_title: Huntress is in the so cheap it costs money to not do it camp.
description: They're great - they constantly give back to the community and try to make the entire channel better.
author: Jason S.
pros: Huntress does what it says on the label and it does it well. They're constantly innovating and attempting to push the envelope while remaining VERY GOOD on their core features. The persistence detection is amazing, and from what I've seen the Managed AV is very good!
cons: Not a lot really - they are NOT the only solution you need but they don't bill themselves as that.

review_title: Immediate impact, ongoing ease of mind
description: Huntress keeps an eye on all of our computers and immediately notifies if an unusual process is set to run automatically. It has found numerous huge potential security problems, and countless little problems (things like adware and junk browsers).
author: Graham P.
pros: Implementation was easy by deploying the agent via our RMM. It immediately found a few major security issues, the support team even helped me confirm the risk.
cons: Initially, there was a problem with how the agents were split into organizations, but this issue has since been resolved.

author: Mert K.
pros: Managing Windows Defender via Huntress is my favorite part of this software
cons: Documentation might be more improved or maybe starting a Huntress University would help partners to understand better their product

author: Ed S.
pros: Deployment and management is a breeze. Client is light weight, non-obtrusive. Detects footholds, malware, etc. that other AV misses.
cons: Don't have any cons for the product. It performs as expected and the Huntress team is constantly adding features which is great!

author: joe J.
pros: Super easy to deploy and use. Support has been fantastic.
cons: So far no complaints besides for maybe only being limited to Windows devices.

review_title: Another layer of protection with Huntress
description: It gives us insight in what slips through the maze.
author: Alexander I.
pros: Easy of deployment. Active support and commitment to the industry
cons: Nothing really. I does what i needs to do and more.

author: Josh J.
pros: Easy to deploy, use and straightfoward pricing. The people and Huntress really care and love what they do.
cons: Nothing!

description: Great product to allow me to replace an existing solution. Cost was a bit higher but the features were well worth making the change.
author: Jack B.
pros: Moving beyond simple antivirus, Huntress provides best of class ransomware protection. The canaries are placed throughout stored data to detect and counter any attempts to encrypt the files.
cons: I had no issues deploying or using the software

author: Andrew E.
pros: Its support team responds quickly and a great resource.
cons: no cons yet >>Maybe when I learn more about it I will have some cons lol
